issue.weather: Cloudy w/ chance of patch notes

ticker.text: AC Black Flag Resynced official — July 9, ray tracing, Matt Ryan returns as Edward Kenway
Splatoon Raiders July 23 confirmed — Nintendo drops Switch 2 date with zero warning
Kiln out now — Double Fine's pottery brawler is day one Game Pass
Saros 7 days out — trophy list revealed, 45 trophies confirmed
Poncle expanding to 15+ projects and two new studios after Vampire Crawlers

lead.title: Edward Kenway Is Back — AC Black Flag Resynced Is Real and It Launches July 9
lead.dek: Ubisoft just revealed a ground-up remake of the beloved 2013 pirate adventure, rebuilt in the Anvil Engine with ray tracing, reworked missions, and Matt Ryan returning as Edward Kenway. July 9 is the date. Here's everything confirmed.
lead.author: Romello Morris

poll.question: AC Black Flag Resynced — how do you feel about it?

options.label: Day one — Black Flag is a masterpiece
Skeptical — Ubisoft has to earn this
Not interested, too busy with April games

calendar.title: Saros
calendar.sub: PS5 Exclusive · Deluxe Early Access Apr 28

spotlight.title: Kiln: Double Fine Made a Pottery Brawler and It Rocks
spotlight.blurb: Kiln launched today on Game Pass. You sculpt a clay pot, then use it as a weapon to smash your opponents' creations in 4v4 arena combat. Double Fine's most unhinged game in years — and it's free with your subscription.

comments.name: Marcus T.
comments.body: AC Black Flag is my favourite AC game and I've been waiting for this since they started remaking everything. July 9 cannot come fast enough. Matt Ryan back as Edward is everything.

comments.name: Priya S.
comments.body: Splatoon Raiders July 23 out of nowhere is classic Nintendo. No buildup, no leaks, just: here's a release date. Switch 2 summer lineup is genuinely stacked.

comments.name: Jade W.
comments.body: Poncle going from one person making Vampire Survivors to 15+ projects and studios in Japan and Italy is one of the great indie success stories. Cannot wait to see what they do with Warhammer Survivors.

comments.name: Devon K.
comments.body: April 2026 is genuinely the best gaming month I can remember. We haven't even hit Diablo 4 and Saros yet. If this month had a Metacritic score it would be a 97.
